data.description: In Cambridge, UK, on April 27, 2026, Bango (AIM: BGO) disclosed its audited full-year results for the period ending December 31, 2025. The company also offered insights into its current trading status and future prospects for 2026.

data.title: The 6th Asian Beach Games opens in Sanya
data.description: The 6th Asian Beach Games Sanya 2026 commenced on the evening of April 22 in Sanya, located in Hainan, China. This event signifies China's second time hosting the Asian Beach Games. It is noteworthy for being the first major international multi-sport occasion held in Hainan.

data.title: Act Now: ezPaycheck with E-File Direct Helps Businesses Beat the April 30 Form 941 Deadline
data.description: Businesses can now prevent last-minute stress and avoid IRS penalties by utilizing fast and precise 941 e-filing integrated into ezPaycheck payroll software. With the first quarter tax deadline of April 30 approaching quickly, it is crucial for businesses to file Form 941 without delays or mistakes. Located in REDMOND, Wash., this solution offers a seamless process to handle payroll tasks efficiently and ensure compliance with tax regulations. It provides a convenient way for businesses to meet their tax obligations and avoid the potential consequences of inaccurate filings. Stay ahead and manage your payroll effectively with this intuitive software.

data.title: Calamos Brings Award-Winning Autocallable Income ETF Strategy to Global Investors with Launch of World's First Autocallable UCITS ETF
data.description: Launching on April 27, the Calamos Autocallable Income UCITS ETF introduces an innovative UCITS framework that makes the $422 billion annual autocallable note market more accessible. This fund aims to provide investors with high and stable monthly income potential through a single-ticker access. This initiative democratizes the market and offers an efficient way to access a portfolio of laddered securities.

data.title: OneLayer Launches Sentry Partner Program to Extend Zero Trust Security for Private Cellular Networks
data.description: A program has been launched to certify top private wireless and security integrators to provide Zero Trust network access security, automatic device onboarding, and managed services on a large scale. The initiative was revealed in Boston on April 27, 2026. OneLayer, a prominent figure in private LTE/5G asset management and Zero Trust solutions, will lead this program.

data.title: Kavalan Appoints Global Travel Retail Specialist SipWell in the UK
data.description: Taiwan's acclaimed Kavalan Distillery has recently partnered with SipWell Brands to enhance its travel retail visibility in the UK. This collaboration aims to expand the distribution of Kavalan's award-winning single malt whisky in the UK market. The decision to optimize its presence in the UK travel retail sector was made to increase exposure and accessibility to the brand. This strategic move comes amidst a growing demand for Kavalan's premium spirits in the UK. The partnership signifies a significant opportunity for Kavalan to capitalize on the UK travel retail market, leveraging the established reputation of SipWell Brands to promote its products. This development is part of Kavalan's broader strategy to broaden its global reach and cater to the increasing number of whisky enthusiasts worldwide.

data.title: JLL Standardises on SwiftConnect's Connected Access Network for Mobile Access Across Corporate Offices and Managed Assets
data.description: In Birmingham, England, SwiftConnect, a provider of connected access networks, revealed that JLL, a prominent commercial real estate services firm, has adopted its platform. This decision enables mobile wallet access in JLL's corporate offices and managed assets. Employees and building occupants can now utilize mobile credentials in NFC wallets instead of physical badges. This move signifies a significant shift towards digital access solutions for facilities management and security as businesses adapt to modern technology trends.

data.title: Rambus Gears Up For Q1 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
data.description: Rambus Inc. (NASDAQ: RMBS) is scheduled to announce its first quarter earnings after the market closes on Monday, April 27. Analysts project earnings of 64 cents per share, an increase from 59 cents per share in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is estimated to be around $179.94 million, compared to $166.66 million reported last year. In February, the company disclosed the departure of its CFO. Following this news, Rambus shares surged by 14.4%, closing at $158.40 on Friday. For more details and updated analyst ratings, interested parties can visit Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page to sort by various criteria.

data.description: Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 27, 2026 - Global Power Solutions Corp. (listed on TSX Venture Exchange as PWER and on Frankfurt Stock Exchanges as NJA) has disclosed its agreement with 2782404 AB LTD via a non-binding Letter of Intent (LOI). The deal aims to assess the feasibility of establishing a modular hydrogen-based energy venture.
